subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1914
subcodes.first_line: With the utmost enmity, Haifa's Qa'im-maqam rose to prevent the construction of the Shrine of the Bab. The official in charge of the Land Registry received instructions
subcodes.first_line_orig: قائم مقام حیفا در نهایت عداوت مانع ساختمان مقام اعلی شد بمامور طاپو دستور داده بودند
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @prayer for assistance; intercession
